title: Minechef
description: Create a restaurant in Minecraft and get clients
body:
# What is this mod ?

This mod adds restaurant to Minecraft. 

For a minimal restaurant, place down a restaurant board, a cash register, a restaurant portal. Then add an item in the restaurant board, then customer will start coming. 

You will then be able to recruit employees. Recruit a cashier to serve customers from plate and fridge, and a cook to craft food. 

# Showcase
